apple_platform_bundle_id.description: Specifies the Apple platform bundle ID associated with the application, required for APNs integration.

apple_platform_team_id.description: Specifies the Apple Developer Team ID associated with the credentials used for the APNs platform application.

event_delivery_failure_topic_arn.description: ARN of the SNS topic to which notifications about delivery failures are sent.

event_endpoint_created_topic_arn.description: ARN of the SNS topic to notify when a new endpoint is created for the platform application.

event_endpoint_deleted_topic_arn.description: ARN of the SNS topic to notify when an endpoint is deleted; must be a valid SNS topic ARN.

event_endpoint_updated_topic_arn.description: ARN of the SNS topic to notify when an endpoint is updated, must be in the same AWS account.

failure_feedback_role_arn.description: IAM role ARN used for failure feedback from the platform application, required for logging delivery status of failed messages.

name.description: The name of the SNS platform application, must be unique within the account.

platform.description: Specifies the platform type for the SNS application, such as APNS, GCM, or ADM. Ensure the value matches the supported platform for your use case.

platform_credential.description: The credential required for the platform application, such as API key or password, depending on the platform type.

platform_principal.description: ARN or identifier of the principal used for the platform-specific credentials, required for creating the SNS platform application.

success_feedback_role_arn.description: IAM role ARN used to give Amazon SNS write access to CloudWatch Logs for success feedback.

success_feedback_sample_rate.description: Defines the percentage of successfully delivered messages for which Amazon SNS will write success feedback logs, specified as an integer between 0 and 100.
